name: 2018 Panini Elite Extra Edition Baseball Cards

sections.title: Base
sections.odds: 200 cards. Serial numbered #/999. · PARALLEL CARDS: Pink. · ASPIRATIONS PARALLELS: Red #/150, Orange #/100, Blue #/75, Tie-Dye #/25, Gold 1/1. · STATUS DIE-CUT PARALLELS: Red #/99, Emerald #/49, Tie-Dye #/10, Gold 1/1.

sections.title: Base Opti-Chrome
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Holo, Gold #/10, Gold Vinyl 1/1.

sections.title: Base Autographs
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Emerald #/25 or #/15, Tie-Dye #/10, Printing Plates 1/1. · ASPIRATIONS PARALLELS: Purple #/100 or less (No Tristan Beck*), Blue #/50 or less, Tie-Dye #/10 or #/5, Gold 1/1 (No Brennen Davis*). · STATUS DIE-CUT PARALLELS: Red #/75 or less, Emerald #/25 or less, Tie-Dye #/5, Gold 1/1 (No Brennen Davis*).

sections.title: Base Opti-Chrome Signatures
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Holo #/25 or less, Gold #/10, Gold Vinyl 1/1.

sections.title: College Ticket Signatures
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Holo #/25 or less, Gold #/10, Gold Vinyl 1/1. · *Kody Clemens only in Gold/Gold Vinyl parallels.*

sections.title: Future Threads Silhouette Autographs Gold
sections.odds: 26 cards. Serial numbered #/99.

sections.title: Future Threads Silhouette Autographs Red
sections.odds: 39 cards. Serial numbered #/49.

sections.title: Future Threads Silhouette Autographs Purple
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Blue #/10, Emerald #/5, Holo Silver 1/1.

sections.title: USA Collegiate Tickets Signatures
sections.odds: 26 cards. Serial numbered #/99. · PARALLEL CARDS: Red #/100, Holo #/25, Gold #/10, Gold Vinyl 1/1. · *Kody Clemens only in Gold/Gold Vinyl parallels.*

sections.title: USA Collegiate Silhouette Autographs
sections.odds: 26 cards. Serial numbered #/99. · PARALLEL CARDS: Gold #/49, Red #/25, Purple #/10, Blue #/5, Holo Silver 1/1.

sections.title: USA 18U National Team Signatures
sections.odds: 20 cards. Serial numbered #/99. · PARALLEL CARDS: Red #/100, Blue #/25, Emerald #/10, Red/White/Blue #/5, Holo Silver 1/1.

sections.title: USA 15U National Team Signatures
sections.odds: 19 cards. Serial numbered #/99. · PARALLEL CARDS: Red #/100, Blue #/25, Emerald #/10, Red/White/Blue #/5, Holo Silver 1/1.

sections.title: Prospect Material
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Silver #/149, Gold #/99, Red #/49, Purple #/25, Blue #/10, Emerald #/5, Holo Silver 1/1. · *JoJo Romero, Luis Escobar, Wei-Chieh Huang only in parallels.* · *Cal Quantrill, Wei-Chieh Huang, Miguel Aparicio not in Silver parallel.*

sections.title: USA Material
sections.odds: 3 base and 10 Silver parallel cards.

sections.title: USA Material Parallels
sections.odds: 40 cards. All serial numbered to 99 or less. · PARALLEL VERSIONS: Gold #/99 or #/49, Red #/49 or #/35, Purple #/25 or #/15, Emerald #/10, Blue #/5, Holo Silver 1/1. · *All players not in every parallel.*

sections.title: Dual Material
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Silver #/149 (No Baddoo*), Gold #/99, Red #/49, Purple #/25, Emerald #/10, Blue #/5, Holo Silver 1/1. · *Joshua Palacios, Kyle Lewis only in parallels.*

sections.title: Dual Silhouettes
sections.odds: 10 cards. Serial numbered #/199. · PARALLEL CARDS: Silver #/149, Gold #/99, Red #/49, Purple #/25, Blue #/10, Emerald #/5, Holo Silver 1/1.

sections.title: Triple Material
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Silver #/149 (No Romero*), Gold #/99, Red #/49 (No Sheffield*), Purple #/25, Emerald #/10, Blue #/5, Holo Silver 1/1. · *Yordan Alvarez, Brandon Marsh, Kevin Newman, Nick Margevicius only in parallels.*

sections.title: Quad Material
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Silver #/149, Gold #/99, Red #/49, Purple #/25, Emerald #/10, Blue #/5, Holo Silver 1/1. · *Jose Siri, Jomar Reyes, Julio Pablo Martinez, Nathan Lukes, Yanio Perez only in select parallels.*

sections.title: College Ticket
